title: A joint resolution directing the removal of United States Armed Forces from hostilities in Ukraine that have not been authorized by Congress.
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations.
crs_summary: This joint resolution directs the President to remove U.S. Armed Forces from hostilities in or affecting Ukraine within 30 days of this resolution's adoption unless a declaration of war or specific authorization for such use of the Armed Forces has been enacted.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations.
